text:
Once upon a time in a quiet village nestled in the rolling hills, there lived a humble girl named Ella. Every morning, she would wander through the meadow, picking flowers for her father’s breakfast. Despite her simplicity, Ella dreamt of adventure.

One day, a mysterious traveler appeared. A charismatic figure with tales from exotic lands. He named himself Orion. Orion had heard whispers of a legendary bird that could fly faster than the wind. Only those lucky enough would catch a glimpse.

Ella was fascinated. She followed Orion into the forest. He led her to a clearing where dozens of birds were dancing. One, a brilliant plumage and feathers glossy like emerald leaves, took flight first, disappearing into the sky.

Ella couldn't believe it. That bird was the Seeker of Flew Fast. Legend had it that the birds gathered secrets. Ella reached out her hand. One fluttered down.

A spark ignited in her palm. With determined wings, she chased the Seeker
